description: The Belcastro are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Ilario dello Ionio, Calabria. They were involved in the Sant'Ilario feud against the D'Agostino clan in the 1990s. Key members include Giuseppe Belcastro, a life-sentenced capobastone, and Domenico Belcastro. The group has been targeted by operations such as Primaluce and Dogville.
